subject: Political Science
overall_learning_objectives: Explain the concept and objectives of federalism
Identify and analyse the key features of federal systems
Differentiate between coming together and holding together federations
Understand the constitutional distribution of powers in India
Analyse the significance of linguistic states in Indian federalism
Evaluate the evolution of Centre–State relations
Understand the importance of decentralisation and local governance

lesson_plan.title: Concept and Importance of Federalism
student_activities: Identify federal countries on a world map
Discuss why federalism is useful in large and diverse countries

lesson_plan.title: Features of Federalism
topics_covered: Role of judiciary in resolving disputes
teaching_strategy: Use of diagrams showing structure of government
student_activities: Prepare a list of key features of federalism
Draw a diagram showing the structure of federal government

lesson_plan.title: Types of Federations
teaching_strategy: Examples of USA, Switzerland, and India
student_activities: Create a comparison chart of the two types of federations
Identify which type India belongs to and explain why

lesson_plan.title: Distribution of Powers in India
student_activities: Categorise given subjects into different constitutional lists
Discuss why power division is necessary

lesson_plan.title: Linguistic States and Language Policy
student_activities: Identify states formed on linguistic basis
Prepare a list of languages spoken in different states

lesson_plan.title: Centre–State Relations
topics_covered: Changes in Centre–State relations over time
student_activities: Discuss examples of cooperation and conflict between Centre and States
Write short notes on coalition governments

lesson_plan.title: Decentralisation and Local Government
teaching_strategy: Diagrammatic explanation of local government structure
student_activities: Draw a diagram of the three-tier local government system
Discuss functions of local governments in daily life

teaching_aids: World map and India political map
teacher_tip: Encourage students to relate federalism concepts with current political events and real-life examples to deepen their understanding.
